grant_title: Boxing Community Center Request for Proposal (RFP)
project_area: Boxing training and mentoring for high-risk youth and young adults, fitness center for Brownsville residents, and onsite case management
demographic_requirements: High-risk youth and young adults, Brownsville residents of all ages
eligibility_summary: Qualified vendors must provide boxing training, mentoring, fitness center services, and case management. Proposals must be submitted via PASSPort by pre-qualified organizations.
